'?' : location.search;if (window.history && window.history.replaceState) {var ogU = location.pathname + window._cf_chl_opt.cOgUQuery + window._cf_chl_opt.cOgUHash;history.replaceState(null, null,"/rss.xml?__cf_chl_rt_tk=deXcr1.unQ.iOZnKATa0sspR.n4uBYjGucdI2.Z3njc-1774072631-1.0.1.1-9w1EKzdE0zrCb39j9csg3CQtSsRHr0hvJKqVlnY38ag"+ window._cf_chl_opt.cOgUHash);a.onload = function() {history.replaceState(null, null, ogU);}}document.getElementsByTagName('head')[0].appendChild(a);}());
